source_text: “Come!” said Defarge. “Here is monsieur, who knows a well-made shoe when he sees one. Show him that shoe you are working at. Take it, monsieur.”
raw_output: “Come,” said Defarge. “Here is monsieur, who knows a well-made shoe when he sees one. Show him that shoe you are working on. Take it, monsieur.”
rewrite_text: “Come,” said Defarge. “Here is monsieur, who knows a well-made shoe when he sees one. Show him that shoe you are working on. Take it, monsieur.”

source_text: “Much obliged,” he said, briefly, to Ikey. “The lazy Irish loafer! My own room’s just above Rosy’s. I’ll just go up there myself after supper and load the shot-gun and wait. If he comes in my back yard he’ll go away in a ambulance instead of a bridal chaise.”
raw_output: “Much obliged,” he said, briefly, to Ikey. “The lazy Irish loafer! My own room’s right above Rosy’s. I’ll just go up there myself after supper and load the shot-gun and wait. If he comes into my back yard, he’ll go away in an ambulance instead of a bridal chaise.”

source_text: “It’s a poor boy from the free-school, sir,” replied Mr. Bumble, “who has been nearly murdered—all but murdered, sir,—by young Twist.”
raw_output: “It’s a poor boy from the free-school, sir,” replied Mr. Bumble, “who has been all but murdered—nearly murdered, sir—by young Twist.”
rewrite_text: “It’s a poor boy from the free-school, sir,” replied Mr. Bumble, “who has been all but murdered—nearly murdered, sir—by young Twist.”

source_text: “I’ll lick you to-morrow,” he heard Cheese-Face promise; and he heard his own voice, piping and trembling with unshed tears, agreeing to be there on the morrow.
raw_output: “I’ll lick you to-morrow,” he heard Cheese-Face promise; and he heard his own voice, piping and quavering with unshed tears, agreeing to be there on the morrow.
rewrite_text: “I’ll lick you to-morrow,” he heard Cheese-Face promise; and he heard his own voice, piping and quavering with unshed tears, agreeing to be there on the morrow.

source_text: “To the eye it is fair enough, here; but seen in its integrity, under the sky, and by the daylight, it is a crumbling tower of waste, mismanagement, extortion, debt, mortgage, oppression, hunger, nakedness, and suffering.”
raw_output: “To the eye it is fair enough here; but seen in its entirety, under the open sky and by daylight, it is a crumbling tower of waste, mismanagement, extortion, debt, mortgage, oppression, hunger, nakedness, and suffering.”
rewrite_text: “To the eye it is fair enough here; but seen in its entirety, under the open sky and by daylight, it is a crumbling tower of waste, mismanagement, extortion, debt, mortgage, oppression, hunger, nakedness, and suffering.”

source_text: “His eyes was pretty shiny,” she confessed; “and he didn’t have no collar, though he went away with one. But mebbe he didn’t have more’n a couple of glasses.”

source_text:
Arise, arise, arise!
There is blood on the earth that denies ye bread;
Be your wounds like eyes
To weep for the dead, the dead, the dead.
What other grief were it just to pay?
Your sons, your wives, your brethren, were they;
Who said they were slain on the battle day?
raw_output:
Arise, arise, arise!
There is blood on the earth that denies ye bread;
Let your wounds be as eyes
To weep for the dead, the dead, the dead.
What other grief were it just to pay?
Your sons, your wives, your brethren, were they;
Who said they were slain on the battle day?
